lines.text: Horse-Drawn Carriage Rides at Port Orleans Resort – Riverside | Walt Disney World Resort
Horse-Drawn Carriage Rides at Disney's Port Orleans Resort - Riverside
LocatedinDisney's Port Orleans Resort - Riverside
Relax on a horse-drawn carriage ride along the scenic banks of the Sassagoula River at Disney’s Port Orleans Resort – Riverside.
All Ages
$65 (tax not included)
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Operating Hours –
View All Times
Check Available Days
Your Carriage Awaits
Take in rustic beauty as you travel along charming pathways on a horse-drawn carriage.
Schedule & Pricing
You’ll board your carriage for a 25-minute ride at the Riverside Levee Marina at Disney’s Port Orleans Resort – Riverside. Carriages fit up to 4 adults (or 2 adults and 3 small children).
Each horse-drawn carriage ride costs $65.
How to Book
Advance reservations are highly recommended, as availability is limited.

Reservations can be made on this page or with the My Disney Experience app up to 60 days prior to your visit. Same-day reservations and walk-ins can be made on a limited basis and are subject to availability.
Know Before You Go
This experience may be cancelled due to inclement weather but will occur in rain and cold.
Guests using a wheelchair must be able to step up into the carriage.
Rides accommodate 4 adults or 2 adults and 3 children only.
There is a 1-day cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if a Guest cancels within one day or no-shows for the reservation.
Please check in at the Riverside Levee Marina at Disney’s Port Orleans Resort – Riverside 15 minutes prior to your reservation.
Allow up to 1.5 hours to get to your destination when traveling within Walt Disney World Resort.
